initial_draft:
The other player has proposed a trade where they give 1 X and receive 50 ZUP. This is higher than my initial willingness to pay of 60 ZUP, but I can consider negotiating.

Given that I have 100 ZUP, I can afford to pay up to 60 ZUP. The other player's proposal of 50 ZUP is within my budget, but I wonder if I can get a better deal.

I will propose a counteroffer of 45 ZUP, which is closer to my maximum willingness to pay but still leaves room for negotiation.
